title: Artificial Intelligence Bomb on Mario Paint Composer
description:
My Twitter: https://twitter.com/_AxelRude
I stream at: https://mixer.com/axelrod777

This song kicks ASS.

This is an original piece composed by "naruto" for the 2003 Famicompo. I decided to try my hand at it and it was so much fun, more than I've had with MPC in a long time. Listen to the original here:

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4gtGeZ2wOmo

Tempo is 1200, but dips down to 900 for a brief moment so I can include triplets. It uses all instruments except the face. I could have stuck it in somewhere for fun, but I didn't feel like going against my original rearrangement for the sake of novelty. I omit the last part of the song because I thought it came to a better close where I ended it and the upcoming part didn't look very fun to work with.

Thanks to MexicanSunflower for some help with FamiTracker.
